=Index of values=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="ask_question"| value Popup.ask_question >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Popup >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ask‾_question ‾?a ‾?a‾_hcf question buttons>>
    ‾Prompt a user‾, wait for its response and return the selected value‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="attach"| value Noderesize.attach >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Noderesize >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="bind"| value Swipe.bind >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Swipe >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|bind ‾‾compute‾_final‾_pos elt>> makes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|elt>> left‾-right
   swipable on touch screens‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="bind"| value Picture_uploader.bind >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|bind>> is a shortcut for <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|bind‾_input>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|bind‾_submit>> actions
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="bind_arrow_keys"| value Carousel.bind_arrow_keys >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="bind_input"| value Picture_uploader.bind_input >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|bind‾_input input preview ‾?container ‾?reset ‾(‾)>>
    ‾Bind <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|input>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|preview>> so the file selected in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|input>> is the
    image displayed in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|preview>>‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="bind_submit"| value Picture_uploader.bind_submit >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| bind‾_submit input button ‾?cropping ‾‾upload ‾‾after‾_submit ‾(‾) >>
    binds the following two actions to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| button >> when it is being clicked‾:
    call <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| do‾_submit >> which uploads the file‾; then call <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| after‾_submit >>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="bottom"| value Style.bottom >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="bullets"| value Carousel.bullets >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾List of bullets for carousel‾.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="click_outside"| value Lib.click_outside >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|click‾_outside e>> returns when user clicks outside element <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|e>>‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_bottom"| value Size.client_bottom >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_height"| value Size.client_height >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|size of an element
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_left"| value Size.client_left >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_page_bottom"| value Size.client_page_bottom >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_page_left"| value Size.client_page_left >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_page_right"| value Size.client_page_right >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_page_top"| value Size.client_page_top >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|position of an element relative to the document
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_right"| value Size.client_right >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_top"| value Size.client_top >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|position of an element relative to the inner window‾;
    get‾Client‾Bounding‾Rect does not include borders by default‾, use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|with‾_margin>>
    to take them into account‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="client_width"| value Size.client_width >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="close"| value Icons.S.close >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Close icon ‾(‾C‾S‾S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-icon‾-close>>‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="config"| value Icons.S.config >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Configuration ‾/ gear icon ‾(‾C‾S‾S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-icon‾-gear>>‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="confirm"| value Popup.confirm >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Popup >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Shortcut using <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ask‾_question>> for prompting the user with a question
    and returning a boolean‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="cropper"| value Picture_uploader.cropper >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| let ‾(reset‾, cropping‾, cropper‾_dom‾) ‾= cropper ‾‾image ‾(‾) >>
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| reset >> is function to call to reset the current cropper status
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| cropping >> are current cropping parameters
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| cropper‾_dom >> is the div containing cropping controllers
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="detach"| value Noderesize.detach >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Noderesize >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="disable_page_scroll"| value Popup.disable_page_scroll >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Popup >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Disable body scrolling hack
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="display"| value Tip.display >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Tip >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="display"| value Style.display >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="display'"| value Style.display' >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="display_of_str"| value Style.display_of_str >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="display_to_str"| value Style.display_to_str >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="do_submit"| value Picture_uploader.do_submit >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| do‾_submit input ‾?cropping ‾‾upload ‾(‾) >>
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|input>> is the input with file loaded
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|cropping>> are cropping info
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|upload>> function to upload the file
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="drawer"| value Drawer.drawer >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Drawer >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Build a drawer menu on the left‾, right‾, top or bottom of the screen‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="dropdown"| value Buttons.dropdown >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Buttons >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="enable_page_scroll"| value Popup.enable_page_scroll >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Popup >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Allows to fix the body manually ‾(see <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|‾?enable‾_scrolling‾_hack>> above‾)
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥F|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="float_of_px"| value Style.float_of_px >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="get_document_size"| value Size.get_document_size >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="get_screen_orientation"| value Size.get_screen_orientation >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="get_screen_size"| value Size.get_screen_size >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="get_size"| value Size.get_size >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥H|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="hcf"| value Popup.hcf >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Popup >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Section with header‾, content and footer‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="height"| value Size.height >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="height_to_bottom"| value Size.height_to_bottom >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Compute the height of an element to the bottom of the page
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="hsv_to_rgb"| value Color_picker.hsv_to_rgb >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Color_picker >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|hsv‾_to‾_rgb h s v>> converts ‾H‾S‾(‾V‾/‾L‾) colors to ‾R‾G‾B‾.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="icon"| value Icons.S.icon >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|icon classes ‾(‾)>> is an empty <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|‾<i‾>>> element whose ‾C‾S‾S classes
      are <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot‾-icon">> followed by <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|classes>>‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="in_ancestors"| value Lib.in_ancestors >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="input"| value Picture_uploader.input >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Create a file input element with good input type <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-pup‾-input>> class
    and wrap it into a label‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="install_global_handler"| value Page_transition.Make.install_global_handler >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page_transition.Make >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="install_global_handler_withURI"| value Page_transition.install_global_handler_withURI >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page_transition >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|install‾_global‾_handler‾_with‾U‾R‾I>> enables you to skip the step of
    creating a module of type <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|‾P‾A‾G‾E‾_‾T‾R‾A‾N‾S‾I‾T‾I‾O‾N‾_‾C‾O‾N‾F>> when screenshots
    are stored as a data uri‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="invisible"| value Style.invisible >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|whether an element is currently invisible in the ‾D‾O‾M ‾(not the screen‾)‾;
    you might want to do a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|‾Nodeready‾.nodeready>> before‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="is_position_sticky"| value Sticky.is_position_sticky >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Sticky >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|whether computed ‾C‾S‾S attribute "position" equals "sticky"
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="is_sticky"| value Sticky.is_sticky >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Sticky >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|whether element is sticky‾, either due to ‾C‾S‾S attribute position‾:sticky or
    due to position‾:sticky polyfill <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make‾_sticky>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="iteri2"| value Lib.List.iteri2 >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib.List >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥K|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="keep_in_sight"| value Sticky.keep_in_sight >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Sticky >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|make sure an element gets never out of sight while scrolling by
    continuously ‾(window scroll‾/resize‾) monitoring the position of the
    element and adjusting the top‾/left value‾.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="left"| value Style.left >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make"| value Toggle.make >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Toggle >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ‾?init‾_up ‾?up‾_txt ‾?down‾_txt ‾(‾)>> produces a binary toggle‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make"| value Time_picker.make >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Time_picker >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ‾?action ‾?round‾_‾5 ‾?h‾2‾4 ‾(‾)>> produces a clock‾-style time picker
    for hours and minutes‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make"| value Range.make >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Range >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ‾?txt‾_up ‾?txt‾_down ‾‾f ‾‾lb ub>> produces a widget for picking
    one of the values in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|‾[lb‾, ub‾)>> via "up" and "down" buttons marked
    with the text <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|txt‾_up>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|txt‾_down>>‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make"| value Pulltorefresh.make >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Pulltorefresh >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Creates a pull‾-to‾-refresh container from an html element‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make"| value Color_picker.make >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Color_picker >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ‾(‾)>> produces a color picker‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make"| value Carousel.make >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Creates a carousel from the elements of a list‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make"| value Calendar.make >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Calendar >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ‾?highlight ‾?click‾_any ‾?action>> produces a calendar‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make_date_picker"| value Calendar.make_date_picker >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Calendar >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make‾_date‾_picker ‾?init ‾(‾)>> returns a client‾-side reactive signal
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|‾(y‾, m‾, d‾)>> corresponding to the date <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|d>>‾:<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|m>>‾:<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|y>> that the user
    clicks on‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make_hours_minutes_seq"| value Time_picker.make_hours_minutes_seq >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Time_picker >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Alias of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>>‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make_lazy"| value Carousel.make_lazy >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|same as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>> except for the last argument‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="make_sticky"| value Sticky.make_sticky >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Sticky >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|position‾:sticky polyfill which is not supported by some browsers‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="marginBottom"| value Style.marginBottom >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="marginLeft"| value Style.marginLeft >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="marginRight"| value Style.marginRight >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="marginTop"| value Style.marginTop >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="mk_form"| value Picture_uploader.mk_form >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Ready‾-to‾-use form‾.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="next"| value Carousel.next >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Button to go to the next page ‾(or more pages if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|offset>> is present‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="nodeready"| value Nodeready.nodeready >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Nodeready >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Wait for a node to be inserted in the ‾D‾O‾M‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="noderesize"| value Noderesize.noderesize >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Noderesize >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾When <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|safe>> is set to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>>‾, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|noderesize>> will work whatever sized is
    the watched element‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="num_active_spinners"| value Spinner.num_active_spinners >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Spinner >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|the number of spinners currently spinning
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥O|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="ocaml_service_upload"| value Picture_uploader.ocaml_service_upload >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="onloaded"| value Spinner.onloaded >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Spinner >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|onloaded>> is an event that fires when all spinners have finished loading‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="onloads"| value Lib.onloads >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="onresizes"| value Lib.onresizes >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾N‾O‾T‾E‾: be careful when using the functions <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|onresizes>>‾,
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|window‾_scroll>>‾, and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|window‾_scrolls>>‾.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="pageYOffset"| value Size.pageYOffset >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Current vertical scroll position of the page‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="parse_px"| value Style.parse_px >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="plus"| value Icons.S.plus >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Predefined "plus" ‾/ add icon ‾(‾C‾S‾S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-plus>>‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="popup"| value Popup.popup >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Popup >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"| popup ‾?a ‾?enable‾_scrolling‾_hack
       ‾?close‾_button ‾?confirmation‾_onclose ‾?onclose gen‾_content >>
    ‾Display a modal popup‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="preview"| value Picture_uploader.preview >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Create a img element with no src‾, no alt and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-pup‾-preview>> class‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="previous"| value Carousel.previous >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Button to go to the previous page ‾(or mores page if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|offset>> is present‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="px_of_float"| value Style.px_of_float >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥Q|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="question"| value Icons.S.question >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Question mark ‾/ help icon ‾(‾C‾S‾S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-icon‾-question>>‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="replace_content"| value Spinner.replace_content >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Spinner >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|replace‾_content elt thread>> replaces the contents of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|elt>> by the content
    generated by <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|thread>>‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="ribbon"| value Carousel.ribbon >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Menu ‾(or tabs‾) for carousel‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="right"| value Style.right >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="screenshot_container"| value Page_transition.PAGE_TRANSITION_CONF.screenshot_container >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page_transition.PAGE_TRANSITION_CONF >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_adaptative_height"| value Size.set_adaptative_height >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set‾_adaptative‾_height elt f>> will make the width of the element
    recomputed using <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> everytime the height of the window changes‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_adaptative_width"| value Size.set_adaptative_width >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set‾_adaptative‾_width elt f>> will make the width of the element
    recomputed using <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> everytime the width of the window changes‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_bottom"| value Style.set_bottom >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_default_fail"| value Spinner.set_default_fail >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Spinner >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Change the default function used to display error messages
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_default_fail"| value Carousel.set_default_fail >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Change the default function used to display error messages
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_height"| value Style.set_height >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_left"| value Style.set_left >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_position_sticky"| value Sticky.set_position_sticky >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Sticky >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|try to set ‾C‾S‾S attribute "position" to "sticky"‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_right"| value Style.set_right >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_top"| value Style.set_top >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="set_width"| value Style.set_width >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="shutdown"| value Icons.S.shutdown >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Shutdown ‾/ power icon ‾(‾C‾S‾S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-icon‾-power>>‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="signout"| value Icons.S.signout >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Sign out ‾/ logout icon ‾(‾C‾S‾S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-icon‾-sign‾-out>>‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="spinner"| value Icons.S.spinner >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Animated spinner icon
      ‾(‾C‾S‾S classes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-icon‾-spinner ot‾-icon‾-animation‾-spinning>>‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="style"| value Style.style >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="submit"| value Picture_uploader.submit >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Create a button with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-pup‾-sumit>> clas
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="supports_position_sticky"| value Sticky.supports_position_sticky >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Sticky >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="tongue"| value Tongue.tongue >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Tongue >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾A tongue is an expandable panel that can appear from a side of the screen
   ‾(usually top or bottom‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="top"| value Style.top >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="update_width_height"| value Size.update_width_height >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="user"| value Icons.S.user >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Predefined icon for a user ‾/ profile glyph
      ‾(‾C‾S‾S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot‾-icon‾-user>>‾)‾.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥V|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="visibility"| value Style.visibility >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>‾]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@¥¥W|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="wheel"| value Carousel.wheel >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Carousel with ‾3‾D effect‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="width"| value Size.width >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="width_height"| value Size.width_height >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾N‾O‾T‾E‾: mind to stop any signals derived from the following signals ‾(using
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|‾React‾.‾S‾.stop>>‾) on unload‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="window_scroll"| value Lib.window_scroll >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>‾]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="window_scrolls"| value Lib.window_scrolls >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾If <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ios‾_html‾_scroll‾_hack>> then listen on window ‾+ html ‾+ body
    instead of only window‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="with_spinner"| value Spinner.with_spinner >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Spinner >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾On client side‾, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|with‾_spinner th>> returns immediately a spinner
    while ‾Lwt thread <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|th>> is not finished‾, that will automatically
    be replaced by the result of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|th>> when finished‾.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="with_spinner_no_lwt"| value Spinner.with_spinner_no_lwt >> ‾[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Spinner >>‾]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|‾Same as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|with‾_spinner>> but returns immediately‾.
>>
|
¥¥
